svg.title: UML Class Diagram — Shipping Cinema System
svg.text: ▷ extends · ──▶ association · - -▶ FK/maps · Session: UserEmail, UserId, displayName, category · Login by Email · Cart: txtHolderName + BankService → CreditCards
TicketDetail = Cart.aspx.cs · HallRow/SeatData = SeatsPicker.aspx.cs · UX_Users_Email filtered unique on Users.Email
Tickets.Type → TicketsPricing.PersonType · CreditCards: no FK (payment sandbox)
